nasb.text: Then the angel of the Lord said to her, “Return to your mistress, and submit yourself to her authority.”

esv.text: The angel of the Lord said to her, “Return to your mistress and submit to her.”

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者對她說：“回到你主母那裡去，服在她的手下！”

ccb.text: 耶和华的天使对她说：“你要回到女主人那里顺服她。”

csbs.text: 耶和华的使者对她说：“回到你的主母那里，服在她的手下吧。”
